# Bunny

> Bunny is a B2B SaaS billing and quoting platform that eliminates manual revenue operations. It handles CPQ, subscription billing, renewals, self-service, tenant management, and analytics in one unified platform.

## Pages

- [Home](https://bunny.com/): Overview of Bunny's billing and quoting platform for B2B SaaS companies.
- [Why Bunny](https://bunny.com/why-bunny/): Why B2B SaaS companies choose Bunny over spreadsheets and point solutions.
- [Problems We Solve](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/): The revenue operations problems Bunny solves including manual processes, dirty data, and complex billing.
- [About](https://bunny.com/about/): About Bunny, Inc., based in Santa Monica, CA.
- [Pricing](https://bunny.com/pricing/): Bunny's pricing plans.
- [Get a Demo](https://bunny.com/demo/): Request a demo of the Bunny platform.
- [Blog](https://bunny.com/blog/): Articles on revenue operations, CPQ, subscription billing, and B2B SaaS growth.
- [Security](https://bunny.com/security/): Bunny's security practices and SOC 2 Type II certification.
- [Privacy Policy](https://bunny.com/privacy/): Bunny's privacy policy.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://bunny.com/terms/): Bunny's terms and conditions.

## Problems We Solve

- [Manual Quote-to-Cash](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/manual-quote-to-cash/): How Bunny eliminates manual quote-to-cash processes.
- [Siloed Data](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/siloed-data/): How Bunny connects CRM, billing, and finance into a single source of truth.
- [Complex Renewals](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/complex-renewals/): How Bunny automates subscription renewals and expansions.
- [Price Optimization](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/price-optimization/): How Bunny enables flexible pricing without revenue leakage.
- [Self-Service](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/self-service/): How Bunny enables customer self-service portals for B2B SaaS.
- [Slow Time-to-Market](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/time-to-market/): How Bunny helps teams launch new pricing and products faster.
- [Usage-Based Billing](https://bunny.com/problems-we-solve/usage-based-billing/): How Bunny handles usage-based and hybrid billing models.
